thesis: Simplex Financial Holdings is a Japan asset manager and ETF sponsor (TOKYO PRO Market) earning base and success fees on **¥1.34 trillion** AUM. **[Fact]** FY2026 revenue **¥22.5B** and parent EPS **¥317.33/sh** (split-adjusted) were driven by success fees (+53.6% YoY). **[Inference]** Mid-cycle owner cash **¥137.14/sh** (FY2025) is the croupier anchor; the last exchange print **¥464** (100 shares, Jan 2026) is not a continuous liquid market.

key_assumptions.source: FY2025 split-adjusted parent EPS (finfo2026); not FY2026 peak
Four additive proof components summing to Lawrence DCF base

open_questions: Confirm live TSE PRO Market quote and depth before sizing.
Download yuho via EDINET E31267 for segment and non-recurring detail.
Reconcile operating cash flow **¥11,694M** vs net income for owner-cash normalization.
